description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential structure surrounded by a dense arrangement of palm trees, evoking a tropical or coastal setting. The building features a flat roof and a modern, open layout with large glass windows and doors that allow for ample natural light. The front of the bungalow opens onto a landscaped area with green grass and a pathway leading to the entrance, while the rear faces a scenic ocean backdrop. The exterior is predominantly white or light gray, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The presence of a wide, covered porch area at the front provides shaded outdoor living space. The overall design integrates the natural environment with the built structure, creating a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by palm trees and featuring large glass windows and a covered front porch. The structure is set in a coastal environment with a landscaped entrance and ocean backdrop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the landscaped entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical arrangement of palm trees leading to the main entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense palm tree border and the flat roof extending over the structure, with the ocean backdrop visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, more palm trees, and the ocean scene, with less detail on the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the palm tree border and the open, modern layout of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels and grouped windows
